titleStmt.title: SII 34.208: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 208. Veḷḷanūr, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the west wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Agastyēśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya, Śaka 1470, Saumya, Makara, Purva 12, Monday = A.D. 1549, Dec. 3, Monday.

The first two lines, forming a Pāṇḍya inscription, refer to the Pāṇḍya king Sundara-pāṇḍya, who took the Chōḻa country and it has apparently no relation to the Vijayanagara inscription from the end of line 2. Gift of the tax revenue from the entire village of Kaiyiṟ-kuḍi by the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Immaḍi Akkaladēva-chōḻa-mahārāja for the midday worship and for festivals in the Tiruvagattīśvaram temple at Veḷḷainallūr in Teṉchiṟuvāyil-nāḍu in Jeyasiṅgakulakāla-vaḷanāḍu. The donor has the attributes Torai-vīmaṉ and sāmanta-nārāyaṇaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śrīkOccaṭai paṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ c
cōnāṭu koṇṭaruḷiya cuntarapāṇṭiya tēvaṟku yāṇ ceyaciñka kulakā
la vaḷanāṭṭu teṉciṟuvayanāṭṭu veḷḷai nallūr Uṭaiyār tiruvakattī
yīcuramuṭaiya nāyanāṟku catācivarāyaṉ piṟativirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa
cakāttam 1000 4 100 7 10 ṉ mēl cellā niṉṟa cavumiya camvatccarattu makaranāyaṟṟu
pūṟuva pakkaṣattu tuvāteciyum cōma vāramum peṟṟa ciṟimaṉ makāmaṇṭalīcura
ṉ tōraivīmaṉ cāmanta nārāyaṇaṉ yimmaṭi Akkala teyva cōḻa makā
rācāviṉ taṉmamāka Innāṭṭukku Uḷpaṭṭa kaiyiṟkuṭi kiṟāmam Oṉṟukku nat
tam ceyttalaittiṭal nañcai puñcai māvaṭai maravaṭai cāraṭai calatta
ram maṟṟum Eṟpeyaṟpaṭṭaṉavum nāḷatu varaiyum patintum varum tāṉa
māṉiyam nīṅkalāka Uṇṭāṉatu Ucci cantikāla cantikkum tirunāḷ cilavukkum
tiruppaṇikkum Āka viṭṭa paṭiyālē Intapaṭikku cantirātityavaraiyum naṭan
tuvarakkaṭavatākavum Intappaṭikku naṭattāmal Akutam paṇṇinavaṉ keṅkai karai
yil kārām pacuvaiyum pirāmaṇaṉaiyu taṉṉuṭaiya kuruvaiyum mātāpitāvaiyum
koṉṟa pāvattilē pōka kaṭavarākavum Iṟpaṭikku Akkala teyva cōḻamakarācāvi
ṉ coṟpaṭikku teṉciṟuvāy nāṭṭuk kaṇakku viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu nampiyār tekṣṇā
mūrtti kayilāya nātar Eḻuttu civanta ceṅkoṇṭa vēḷāṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 34.208 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
